_comment: S17-WEDGE-CITE-03 regression-coverage row. Captures the post-WEDGE expected verdict shape for the judgment-tradeable idea so a future change cannot silently re-isolate the wedge. Locked-in expectations: (a) verdict in {refine, go} (basic tier conservative on un-shipped agentic-economy idea); (b) >= 2 citations; (c) >= 1 non-web citation drawn from chunks with provider_kind in {bazaar, arxiv, twitsh}; (d) citation diversity >= 2 distinct provider_kind values. The 'aggregate' block stays empty until the migration lands and a live run can populate scores. Do not delete this fixture without a follow-up that re-locks the same regression on the new shape.

ideas.idea_text: Gecko: makes judgment tradeable. Use judgmentes as a commodity, use on your pre-idea or on your sprint review refinement. Moviment the agentic economy.
ideas.blocked_on: supabase migration 20260502000000_provider_kind.sql not applied to remote instance — schema cache rejects writes to chunks/sources.provider_kind. Once data-eng applies the migration, rerun: X402_MODE=stub uv run bb research --idea "<above idea_text>" --tier pro --yes; populate the actuals + scores fields
